about.summary: Aristotelous erasmus housing: Terrace studio is a private student studio in City Centre Thessaloniki. This 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed studio features a private terrace and is ideal for students.

sections.title: 🏠 Aristotelous Erasmus Housing – Terrace Studio
sections.content: Aristotelous erasmus housing — this terrace studio offers a private, fully furnished option designed for one tenant. The setup is ideal for students seeking outdoor space and independence in the centre of Thessaloniki.
highlights: Terrace comfort: Grande private terrace with upper city views.
Bedroom setup: 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed layout for single occupancy.
Ideal for students: Cozy student housing option perfect for Erasmus students.

sections.title: 📍 Central Location in Thessaloniki
sections.content: Living in City Centre Thessaloniki means everything is close. Daily necessities like supermarkets, bakeries, cafes, and restaurants are just steps away from Aristotelous Square, and the scenic waterfront is within easy walking distance.
highlights: Top location: Local transport, shopping streets, and nightlife are at your doorstep.
Erasmus housing: Well-connected base that is ideal for students who want central access.

sections.title: 🎓 Perfect for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
This terrace studio Aristotelous is a premium option for digital nomads needing a workspace and students attending local universities. You can walk or take transit to Aristotle University or the City College campus in 20 minutes.

To compare other properties in the building, view our bright Aristotelous studio or our minimal Aristotelous studio.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
Maintenance, water, heating, and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is billed separately. A bi-weekly cleaning service is available for a small fee.

We look forward to welcoming you to Thessaloniki. Reach out via the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: No smoking. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Not suitable for couples or double occupancy. Playing musical instruments not allowed. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_description: Aristotelous erasmus housing: terrace studio with private outdoor space near Aristotle University. Perfect for Erasmus students & digital nomads.
